title: Implement the tested Relay MVP core state machine
outputs: In-memory relay core supports host registration, short-code pairing, device revocation, presence, encrypted envelope append, and cursor replay
Relay core rejects unencrypted payload envelopes
Backend tests cover pairing success, short-code expiry, revocation, presence, and replay cursor behavior
do_not_do: Do not add cloud deployment, DNS, or account/payment dependencies
Do not integrate the relay core into production WebSocket routing in this task
Do not store plaintext prompt/output/source payloads
Do not change the local LAN reference path
